nodes.name: types.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for type system queries, verifying plan generation for various data type expressions and type inference.

nodes.name: unify_first_last_value.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for FIRST_VALUE/LAST_VALUE window function unification optimization, testing merging of redundant window functions.

nodes.name: union.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for UNION and UNION ALL queries, testing set union plan generation and deduplication operator placement.

nodes.name: update.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for UPDATE statements including UPDATE FROM and subquery-driven updates, testing DML plan generation.

nodes.name: vector_search.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for vector similarity search queries (ANN/KNN), testing plan generation for vector index scans and distance functions.

nodes.name: watermark.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for watermark definition and propagation queries, verifying watermark operator placement in streaming plans.

nodes.name: watermark_group.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for grouped watermark queries, testing watermark propagation through aggregation and join operators.

nodes.name: watermark_ttl.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for watermark TTL (time-to-live) state cleanup, verifying TTL-based state expiration plan generation.

nodes.name: window_join.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for window join queries (joining two streams within a time window), testing interval join plan generation.

nodes.name: with_ordinality.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for WITH ORDINALITY table function calls (e.g., unnest WITH ORDINALITY), testing ordinal position column plan generation.
